calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Scott Hughes.
Petitioner: Bi Q. Chen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Xian Shi Zheng, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Son A. Zheng, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Maggie Zheng.
Decree signed in open court.
